ideal_must_detect.matched_text: only business contact information will be processed for initial scoping
Term Sheet for Proposed Acquisition between Halcyon Meridian Ltd (Singapore-incorporated, listed on the Marina Securities Exchange Mainboard) and the shareholders of Radiant Infocomm Pte Ltd.

Transaction: Halcyon Meridian Ltd to acquire 60% of the issued shares of Radiant Infocomm Pte Ltd for an aggregate consideration of S$48,000,000, satisfied by S$36,000,000 cash and the balance in newly issued ordinary shares subject to Marina Securities Exchange approvals.
